name: use-html-theme
description: On any HTML-generation request, offer a small catalog of visual themes (Birchline warm-editorial, Technical-minimal docs-site, High-contrast-dark dashboard), apply the chosen theme to all subsequent HTML in the session, and optionally persist it per-project. Overrides via natural language and [theme: x] inline flags; ask to preview the themes for a side-by-side catalog page. Fully-isolated themes with progressive disclosure — only the chosen theme's tokens are read.
